mapper.select: SELECT c.corporation_cd, c.corporation_nm, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'business_no', '') AS business_no, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'ceo_nm', '') AS ceo_nm, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'address', '') AS address, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'tel_no', '') AS tel_no, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'fax_no', '') AS fax_no, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'email', '') AS email, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'homepage_url', '') AS homepage_url, COALESCE(c.corporation_info->>'remark', '') AS remark, c.is_active AS active, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COALESCE(c.created_by, '') AS created_by, COALESCE(c.updated_by, '') AS updated_by FROM om_corporation_m c WHERE c.corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}
SELECT corporation_cd, corporation_nm, COALESCE(corporation_info::text, '{}') AS corporation_info_raw, is_active AS active FROM om_corporation_m WHERE corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE om_corporation_m SET corporation_nm = #{corporationNm}, corporation_info = CAST(#{corporationInfoJson} AS jsonb), is_active = #{active}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}
